mapper.sql: novel_id, novel_name, author_id, category_id, cover_image, content, novel_status, click_count, collect_count, recommend_count, score, score_count, last_update_time, last_chapter_id, last_chapter_name, status, created_time, updated_time, deleted
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM novel WHERE novel_id = #{novelId} AND deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM novel WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_time DESC

SELECT
FROM novel WHERE author_id = #{authorId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_time DESC

SELECT
FROM novel WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_time DESC

SELECT
FROM novel WHERE novel_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{novelName}, '%') AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY click_count DESC

SELECT
FROM novel WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY click_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT
FROM novel WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY last_update_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO novel ( novel_name, author_id, category_id, cover_image, content, novel_status, click_count, collect_count, recommend_count, score, score_count, last_update_time, last_chapter_id, last_chapter_name, status, created_time, updated_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{novelName}, #{authorId}, #{categoryId}, #{coverImage}, #{content}, #{novelStatus}, #{clickCount}, #{collectCount}, #{recommendCount}, #{score}, #{scoreCount}, #{lastUpdateTime}, #{lastChapterId}, #{lastChapterName}, #{status}, #{createdTime}, #{updatedTime}, #{deleted} )
